args.code: (() => { const out = {}; out.bodyOverflow = getComputedStyle(document.body).overflowY; out.htmlOverflow = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).overflowY; out.bodyScrollH = document.body.scrollHeight; out.bodyClientH = document.body.clientHeight; out.winH = window.innerHeight; out.docElScrollH = document.documentElement.scrollHeight; const tall = []; document.querySelectorAll('div,main,section,ul').forEach(el => { if (el.scrollHeight > window.innerHeight + 100) { const cs = getComputedStyle(el); tall.push({ tag: el.tagName, cls: (el.className||'').toString().slice(0,50), sh: el.scrollHeight, ch: el.clientHeight, oy: cs.overflowY, canScroll: el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight + 20 }); } }); out.tallElements = tall.slice(0,12); return JSON.stringify(out); })()
